cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out what the main idea of this passage is. The question is asking what the passage is mainly about, with options A to D. The passage starts by saying the author liked most of their college teachers but doesn't remember them well except for Mr. Jones, their senior English teacher. Then the author goes into great detail about Mr. Jones—his appearance, his teaching style, his personality. The author describes how he was enthusiastic, knew his subject, was firm but fair, assigned a lot of homework and quizzes, encouraged discussions, and was passionate about teaching.
